docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,213.50 FILED BY UPTON, TAYLER CALDERON, LEAH AS TO DEFENDANT PYHALA, KAISA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-20-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
